channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: One Music PH Reviews "Tanga" and "hulog" by KAIA
item.description: The article discusses the music review of KAIA's songs "Tanga" and "hulog" featured in One Music PH. Published on July 4, 2026, the piece highlights the band's performance and the reception of their l...

item.description: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce, the NFL star and pop icon, tied the knot in a grand wedding at Madison Square Garden in New York on July 3, 2026. The ceremony, dubbed 'America’s royal wedding,' feature...

item.title: Nigeria's fake council scandal: Forged documents and legal charges against Prince Adeyemi
item.description: A Nigerian official, Prince Adeniyi Adeyemi Mathew, faces legal charges for allegedly forging presidential documents and running a fake organization. The case involves a controversial council, purport...

item.title: A Heartfelt Story of Family, Drag, and Political Themes in ‘Chica Checa’
item.description: Šimon Holý’s film 'Chica Checa' explores the complex relationship between a mother and son in a small Czech village, where the son, Lukáś, hides his identity as a drag queen named Chica Checa. The sto...

item.title: Weekend Events Guide: July 6-12 Highlights

item.title: RCMP officer fatally shoots man near Irricana; ASIRT launches investigation
item.description: An RCMP officer fatally shot a man near Irricana, Alberta, during an altercation on Highway 9 on July 4, 2026. Airdrie RCMP were dispatched to an open-line 911 call at approximately 6:20 p.m., arrivin...

item.title: Greater Western Sydney Giants Defeat Fremantle Dockers to End Their Winning Streak
item.description: The Greater Western Sydney Giants delivered a decisive 16.13 (109) to 13.10 (88) victory over the dominant Fremantle Dockers in Canberra, ending the Dockers' 14-game winning streak. The match, played ...

item.title: Concerns Over Neighbour's Potential Development on Council Land

item.title: Transnet's Fuel Pipeline Costs Surpass R28bn, 16 Years Behind Schedule
item.description: Transnet's multi-product pipeline (MPP) project, which has faced repeated delays, has seen costs balloon by more than R17bn, with completion now expected by November 2027—16 years behind its original ...

item.title: Nigeria Faces Football Crisis Amid World Cup Qualification Failures

item.title: Hawthorn's 12-goal comeback falls short as Melbourne secures victory

item.title: Fitness Creator Gachau Njoroge Shares Earnings from Vurugu 2 Boxing Event
item.description: Fitness content creator Gachau Njoroge has disclosed that he earned KSh 650,000 from participating in the Vurugu 2 boxing event, despite losing the match to his friend Phil. During an interview with A...

item.title: Tragic sinking of B.C. charter boat leaves six missing, four rescued
item.description: A charter boat sank off the coast of British Columbia, leaving six people missing and four rescued. The incident occurred under severe weather conditions, with the vessel carrying passengers and crew....
